meta.title: The Veil of Ignorance
meta.description: An interactive resource allocation game exploring Rawlsian fairness behind the veil of ignorance

reveal.closing_question: Would you accept this allocation if you didn't know which position you'd occupy?

worst_not_maximin.what_the_player_did: You were assigned the worst position, and the system you designed does not meet the minimum threshold for that position. You built a system that fails the people who need it most.

worst_maximin.what_the_player_did: You were assigned the worst position, but the system you designed meets the minimum threshold. Even at the bottom, the floor holds.

middle_not_maximin.what_the_player_did: You landed in a middle position. You're fine — but the people below you are not. Your system doesn't guarantee a livable minimum.

favorable_not_maximin.what_the_player_did: You landed in a favorable position. The system works well for you. But would you have designed it the same way if you expected to be at the bottom?

any_maximin.what_the_player_did: Regardless of where you landed, your system meets the maximin threshold. The worst-off position still receives enough to function.
